description_long: This object is a robust, industrial-style storage locker constructed primarily from metal, painted in a worn blue finish with visible signs of use and weathering. The locker features three vertical compartments, each with a door that can swing open, and two of the doors are shown detached or ajar, revealing the interior. The front of each compartment is adorned with horizontal ventilation slits and a circular indentation, likely for a locking mechanism. The structure is boxy and solid, with reinforced edges and a flat top and base, suggesting durability and stability. The locker is designed to be placed against a wall or in a row with similar units, typical of urban or industrial environments. Its utilitarian design and rugged appearance make it suitable for storing personal belongings, tools, or equipment in public or semi-public spaces.
description: A rugged blue metal storage locker with three compartments, each featuring vented doors and visible wear. Two doors are open or detached, exposing the interior and emphasizing its utilitarian, industrial design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the locker and one door partially open, highlighting the thickness and construction of the metal panels.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned back panel and the side profile of an open door extending outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the open door and the locker’s sturdy, rectangular frame.
description_view_3: Front view showing all three compartments, with two doors open or removed, revealing the interior and the vented design of the doors.
